provenProcess.subTitle: Our Process
provenProcess.title: How We Deliver
provenProcess.step1.title: Assess & Plan
provenProcess.step1.description: We analyze your market, requirements, and constraints to define a clear technical roadmap aligned with your business goals.
provenProcess.step2.title: Build & Ship
provenProcess.step2.description: Iterative development on cloud-native architecture. Regular demos, production-ready code, continuous deployment.
provenProcess.step3.title: Transfer & Hand Over
provenProcess.step3.description: We train your team, transfer the codebase and infrastructure, and ensure you have full autonomy to run and evolve the platform.
team.ceo.subTitle: Meet Our CEO
team.ceo.name: Mohamed Alaoui
team.ceo.description: Founder of Cultydata Studio. 20+ years in tech consulting, blockchain and data platforms. Built and delivered enterprise solutions for major financial institutions. Now focused on building AI-augmented organizations for startups and scale-ups.

aboutUs.title: We Build. We Ship. We Hand Over.
aboutUs.description: Cultydata Studio helps startups and scale-ups go from concept to production-ready platform. We combine a lean team of senior engineers with specialized AI agents to build, operate, and transfer digital products. No bench. No overhead. Just delivery.
whyChooseUs.title: Why Work With Us
whyChooseUs.feature1.title: Lean & Fast
whyChooseUs.feature1.description: Small team, fast decisions. We adapt to your pace and ship iteratively.
whyChooseUs.feature2.title: Deep Tech Expertise
whyChooseUs.feature2.description: Blockchain, data science, full-stack platforms — hands-on experience across domains.
whyChooseUs.feature3.title: Delivery-Focused
whyChooseUs.feature3.description: We measure success by what ships to production, not by hours billed.
ourValueProposition.title: What You Get
ourValueProposition.feature1.title: Senior Engineers From Day One
ourValueProposition.feature1.description: No juniors, no ramp-up. Our team delivers value from the first sprint.
ourValueProposition.feature2.title: AI-Augmented Workflows
ourValueProposition.feature2.description: AI agents handle code reviews, QA, documentation, and DevOps. Humans focus on architecture and decisions.
ourValueProposition.feature3.title: Flat Organization
ourValueProposition.feature3.description: Every team member makes decisions and ships value. No layers, no bureaucracy.
ourValueProposition.feature4.title: Cost Efficiency
ourValueProposition.feature4.description: Shared tooling and AI agents reduce costs. You pay for results, not headcount.
ourValueProposition.feature5.title: Full Ownership Transfer
ourValueProposition.feature5.description: We build it, document it, and hand it over. You own everything — code, infra, knowledge.
service.bcsd.title: Blockchain Solutions
service.bcsd.service.desc: Custom blockchain platforms for consortiums — private or public chain. Tokenized assets, DApps, smart contracts, and chain integration.
service.bcsd.useCase1: Trading platform for tokenized carbon credits on Hyperledger Besu — 9-bank consortium, $45M raised.
service.bcsd.useCase2: Decentralized notarization platform with multi-party data certification.
service.bcsd.support.desc: Our team handles architecture, development, QA, and deployment. We transfer the platform when you're ready.
service.fspd.title: Full-Stack Platforms
service.fspd.offer.desc: Web2 and Web3 platforms from frontend to backend — API design, cloud deployment, and everything in between.
service.fspd.useCase1: Complete trading platform for a financial services firm — design to production.
service.fspd.support.desc: Full team coverage: architecture, dev, QA, DevOps. We ship, then we hand over.
service.dsml.title: Data Science & Machine Learning
service.dsml.offer.desc: Predictive analytics, time series models, and custom ML pipelines. We turn your data into actionable decisions.
service.dsml.useCase1: ML models for risk analysis and automated decision-making in financial services.
service.dsml.useCase2: Predictive models for financial forecasting and regulatory compliance.
service.dsml.support.desc: From data pipeline to production model. We build, validate, deploy, and transfer.
service.comprehensiveSupport.offer.desc: A complete feature team — design, architecture, development, QA, DevSecOps — augmented by AI agents. From first commit to final handover.
service.comprehensiveSupport.design.desc: User-centered interfaces built for your business goals.
service.comprehensiveSupport.arch.title: Architecture
service.comprehensiveSupport.arch.desc: Scalable, cloud-native architectures tailored to your requirements.
service.comprehensiveSupport.qa.title: Quality Assurance
service.comprehensiveSupport.qa.desc: Automated and manual testing. AI agents run regression suites on every commit.
service.comprehensiveSupport.devsecops.d: Security integrated from day one. CI/CD pipelines with automated security scanning.
service.comprehensiveSupport.handover.de: Full documentation, knowledge transfer, and training. You take full ownership.
service.comprehensiveSupport.promo.title: AI Agents
service.comprehensiveSupport.promo.desc: Specialized AI agents for code review, documentation, testing, and DevOps — multiplying team capacity.
service.comprehensiveSupport.useCase1: Full platform delivery for a fintech startup — design through deployment — followed by complete handover to their team.
service.comprehensiveSupport.useCase2: Application build and deployment for a financial institution, including QA, security hardening, and post-launch support.
caseStudy.description: Designed and deployed an enterprise-grade trading platform on a private blockchain (Hyperledger Besu) for tokenized carbon credits.
caseStudy.achievement1: Organized and ran a globally distributed engineering team.
caseStudy.achievement2: Transitioned CarbonPlace from POC to MVP — from 4 banks to a 9-bank consortium, $45M raised.
caseStudy.valueDescription: A scalable, secure blockchain trading platform supporting multiple financial institutions in production.
caseStudy.sharedKYC.title: Shared KYC Solution
caseStudy.sharedKYC.description: Led the technical build of a shared KYC solution to streamline client onboarding for investment fund asset managers.
caseStudy.sharedKYC.achievement1: Implemented KYC decentralization on private blockchain.
caseStudy.sharedKYC.valueDescription: Faster, more efficient client onboarding through a decentralized approach.

contactForm.title: Ready to Get Started?
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.pageTitle: Your Data, Our Priority: Privacy and Security
privacyPolicy.section1.title: Data Protection
privacyPolicy.section1.text: We implement rigorous data protection measures compliant with GDPR and international regulations. Your data is handled with care and respect for privacy.
privacyPolicy.section2.title: Transparent Data Usage
privacyPolicy.section2.text: Our privacy policy details how we collect, process, and store data. You have full visibility and control over your information.
privacyPolicy.section3.title: Secure Infrastructure
privacyPolicy.section3.text: Industry-standard encryption, regular security audits, and strict access controls protect against unauthorized access.
privacyPolicy.section4.title: Continuous Compliance
privacyPolicy.section4.text: We continuously update our practices to stay compliant with evolving data protection laws and industry standards.
